apps.name: LoveIwara
apps.subtitle: Love Iwara (i-iwara or 2i). An unofficial iwara flutter app - Supporting multiple platforms and devices including mobile phones, tablets and computers. Compatible with Android, Windows and other systems. 第三方的Iwara应用 - 支持多个平台和设备，包括手机、平板和计算机。兼容 安卓、IOS、Windows、MacOS等系统。
apps.versionDescription:
# 🚀 Release Notes for Version 0.4.3

## 🔥 Highlights

* **Smoother Back Gestures**: We've rebuilt the navigation system from the ground up. Android users with predictive back gestures enabled will now see a preview animation when swiping back, and iOS users will enjoy swipe-back interactions that feel much closer to native apps. Overall navigation is now faster and more fluid.

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

* **Crash Fix for Some Devices**: Fixed crashes on certain devices caused by incorrect Impeller rendering engine configuration. ([#79](https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara/issues/79))
* **Windows Video Playback Freeze**: Removed Windows zip build artifacts and now use installer only. This resolves the issue where the app would freeze during video playback while audio kept playing. ([#80](https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara/issues/80))
```The Windows version will be uploaded again later```
## 🛠 Optimizations

* **Better List & Detail Pages**: Common list pages and detail pages now have improved layouts and interactions for a cleaner, more intuitive experience.
* **Performance & Stability**: Various under-the-hood optimizations to improve smoothness and fix bugs.

## 📢 How to Provide Feedback

* Leave a comment in the GitHub issues section
* Or join the [discussion group](https://t.me/+ITH4CV6Z_sc2ZWVl)

Your feedback is extremely valuable to us. Thank you for your continued support and help! 🚀


---

# 🚀 0.4.3 版本发布说明

## 🔥 重点更新

* **更流畅的返回手势**：我们对导航系统进行了全面重构。开启预测性返回手势的安卓用户，滑动返回时可以看到预览动画；iOS 用户则能享受更接近原生应用的手势返回体验。整体导航更快更流畅。

## 🐛 问题修复
```Windows版本在稍后会重新上传```
* **部分机型闪退修复**：修复了因 Impeller 渲染引擎配置错误导致部分机型闪退的问题。([#79](https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara/issues/79))
* **Windows 视频播放卡死**：移除 Windows zip 构建产物，统一使用安装器进行安装，解决了视频播放时应用卡死（但音频仍在播放）的问题。([#80](https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara/issues/80))

## 🛠 优化改进

* **列表与详情页优化**：常用列表页和详情页的布局与交互得到优化，界面更简洁，操作更直观。
* **流畅度与稳定性提升**：多项底层优化，提升整体流畅度，修复已知问题。

## 📢 反馈方式

* 在 GitHub issues 区留言
* 加入[用户讨论群](https://t.me/+ITH4CV6Z_sc2ZWVl)

你的每一条反馈都对我们非常重要，感谢一直以来的支持与帮助！🚀
apps.localizedDescription: Thank you for your understanding and support! If you're also a Flutter beginner, I hope we can progress together in our learning journey.

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: App需要访问位置来获取WiFi信息

apps.name: Pica Comic
apps.subtitle: A comic app built with Flutter, supporting multiple comic sources.
apps.versionDescription:
## 4.2.10 (2026-01-11)

### 更新说明
* 修复 ehentai 登录, 补全高级搜索项 #194 
* 补全 hitomi tags 显示, 改进搜索 #175

### 安装&更新
* (Android) 安装时不会覆盖 4.0.4 及之前的版本。用户数据通用，请在设置中手动迁移。
* IOS、MacOS 版本未经任何测试，不受任何支持.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Pacalini/PicaComic/compare/v4.2.9...v4.2.10
apps.localizedDescription: A comic app with multiple sources built with flutter.
